title: Fix query system P1/P2 review issues
description: Address review feedback on b914e92 (query system, 6j5). 3 P1 blocking issues: (1) Pointer invalidation in advanceStates after append reallocation, (2) currentFieldID() stub always returns 0 — field matching silently broken, (3) Alternation pass-through steps with symbol=0 treated as wildcards in introduceNewStates. 4 P2 issues: (1) Quantifier fork creates incorrect capture state, (2) Linear scan instead of binary search on sorted pattern map, (3) Missing test coverage for alternation/field/quantifier matching, (4) uint16 overflow risk for step indices. Branch: feat/query-system.
